case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOCERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. THOMAS RANDOLPH

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOCERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOCERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANDOLPH, THOMAS $8,445.16 PRINCIPAL, $329.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,774.16, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
